summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Kenya Challenge app restructure: Walker Types and Achievement Levels separation. Backend 100% successful (20/20 tests passed). Frontend mostly working with one authentication-related issue on Challenges page.

authentication_issues.issue: Challenges page redirects to login when accessed directly without authentication
authentication_issues.workaround: Must login first, then navigate to challenges page

passed_tests: Backend API: GET /api/walker-types returns 3 types (Basic $25, Builder $97, Leader $250)
Walker login (john@example.com) successful - dashboard loads correctly
Admin login (sabrina@kenyaeducationfund.org) successful - admin page loads
Dashboard shows Walker Type 'Builder' with $97 cost correctly
Admin page shows 'Walker Types' tab with CRUD functionality
Admin page shows 'Achievements' tab with 5 levels and CRUD functionality
Fundraising page shows achievement level section with current achievement 'Life Skills Training'
Fundraising page displays John's profile and sponsorship functionality correctly
All 20 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication redirect issue on Challenges page - users should be able to access challenges page directly or implement proper route protection with clear messaging
